summary: Chronic smoking combined with progressive jaundice, pruritus, and clay-colored stools suggests obstruction at the ampulla of Vater; imaging showing dilated pancreatic and bile ducts supports this as indicative of periampullary cancer like carcinomas affecting that area. \boxed{\text{Periampullary Carcinoma}} This summary captures the essential diagnostic clues from the provided information while focusing directly on what needs addressing clinically based on given details about the case scenario.
